# HLDesignedIt

> Websites, automation, apps, and digital systems for small businesses that need clearer messaging and more inquiries.

## Business identity

- Name: HLDesignedIt
- Former name: HL Design Edit / Harold Ligon Design & Edit
- URL: https://hldesignedit.com/
- Email: info@hldesignedit.com
- Founder: Harold Ligon
- Positioning: Website design and practical digital systems for small businesses
## Services

Alpha Zone Labs provides:

- Websites and online presence setup
- Website redesigns, landing pages, local SEO, AI-ready content structure, and conversion cleanup
- Business automation using connected forms, spreadsheets, reminders, email workflows, and follow-up systems
- Custom apps, dashboards, portals, registration tools, admin panels, and lightweight business tools
- Digital workflow consulting, tech stack cleanup, launch planning, and process mapping

## Analyzer

The Digital Presence Analyzer is the renamed Alpha Zone Labs version of the website analyzer. It reviews a current website for clarity, trust signals, mobile usability, search readiness, AI-readiness, and lead flow opportunities.

## Best fit

Alpha Zone Labs is best for small businesses, service businesses, nonprofits, restaurants, coaches, consultants, organizations, and growing teams that need clearer websites, smarter workflows, and practical digital systems.
